name: Parse core pairs
summary: Core pair formation for ordinary paired reads.
goal: Reach oracle parity on simple UU, unmapped, low-MAPQ, reverse-strand, and flip cases.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement pairsam extra columns.
Do not implement walks/chimeric behavior beyond explicitly scoped fixtures.
Do not implement sort or downstream commands.
oracle_commands: pixi run pairtools parse -c tests/fixtures/M030_simple_uu.chrom.sizes --drop-sam tests/fixtures/M030_simple_uu.sam
candidate_commands: pixi run cargo run -- parse -c tests/fixtures/M030_simple_uu.chrom.sizes --drop-sam tests/fixtures/M030_simple_uu.sam
acceptance_criteria: Core pair rows match pairtools oracle for scoped fixtures.
Unsupported pair semantics fail loudly or remain outside accepted CLI surface.
known_risks: Ordinary paired-read parity does not imply walks or pairsam parity.
